title: 20:04 â February 28, 2020
body_text:
20:04 â February 28, 2020
Counterfeit Banknote Reporting Process Update
We updated content in the Payment Solutions Manual to reflect the change in reporting counterfeit banknotes per advisories published on the Secure Site:
Termination of RCMP Counterfeit Currency Submission Program
and
Clarification of the Counterfeit Bank Notes Reporting Process
. Please see details in the table below.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering System Part (BC)
Section 6.8, Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes in Incoming Cash Parcels
We updated instructions to indicate that counterfeit bank notes received in cash parcels from RBC should be returned to RBC and not forwarded to the RCMP or local police department.
Section 9.9, Returning/Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes
We updated instructions to reflect that counterfeit bank notes received on deposit should be forwarded to the local police department â not RCMP, unless there is no local police department in your region.
Cash Parcel Online Ordering System Part (Ontario)
Section 6.8, Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes in Incoming Cash Parcels
We updated instructions to indicate that counterfeit bank notes received in cash parcels from RBC should be returned to RBC and not forwarded to the RCMP or local police department.
Section 9.9, Returning/Handling Counterfeit Bank Notes
We updated instructions to reflect that counterfeit bank notes received on deposit should be forwarded to the local police department â not RCMP, unless there is no local police department in your region.
